framing: Numerical/operational equivalence of the JAX GPU port vs a retained CPU-WRF forecast under the SAME ICs/LBCs (validated replay path). NOT bitwise vs Fortran; NOT a JAX-vs-JAX self-compare. The GPU port is separately bitwise self-deterministic (asserted elsewhere, not measured here). Verdict is against PREDECLARED per-field pooled-RMSE tolerances stated in the script header.

speedup.method: mean d02 per-step wall * step-count for the lead
